name: Tipalti AP Automation API
what_it_does: Tipalti REST API for global accounts payable automation platform. Enables AI agents to manage payees and vendor onboarding, submit payment requests, retrieve payment status, access approval workflows, and integrate Tipalti payment data into ERP and finance workflows. Tipalti handles global mass payouts in 196 countries with tax compliance (W-9/W-8) built in.
use_cases: Submitting vendor payment requests from AP automation workflow agents
Retrieving payment approval status from finance operations agents
Managing payee onboarding and tax document collection from vendor management agents
Integrating Tipalti payment data into ERP and accounting reconciliation agents
not_for: Consumer payments (Tipalti is enterprise B2B AP automation)
Simple single-vendor payment scenarios without multi-currency needs
best_when: A company with high-volume vendor payments using Tipalti wants AI agents to automate payment submission, track approval workflows, and integrate payable data into ERP and accounting systems.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Payment submission errors can cause incorrect vendor payments. Approval workflow bypass is a fraud risk. Test all payment logic in Tipalti sandbox before production.

auth.notes: Tipalti API uses HMAC-SHA256 signed requests with payer entity API key and secret. Timestamp-based signature prevents replay attacks. Keys available in Tipalti dashboard.

pricing.paid_tiers: Platform fee plus transaction fees; pricing based on payment volume
pricing.notes: Enterprise AP automation platform. Pricing based on payment volume and features. Contact Tipalti sales.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Payment submission errors cause real vendor payment issues — test extensively in sandbox
No public MCP server — HMAC-signed REST API integration required
HMAC signature generation is required on all API calls — use official documentation carefully
Payment approval workflows must be respected — bypassing approvals is fraud risk
Global payment compliance (W-9/W-8, VAT) is automated but verify per payee country
Tipalti sandbox environment required for testing — do not test on production
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Vendor payment data. PCI-DSS, SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. HMAC-signed requests with timestamp. EU data residency. Strong anti-fraud controls.

security_score_components.security_notes: Vendor payment data. PCI-DSS, SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. HMAC-signed requests with replay protection. EU data residency.
